ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the student */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the student */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the student */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the student's address */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code of the student's phone number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the student (S for Single, W for Married, D for Divorced) */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "international" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is an international student */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the student */,
  "preferred_name" TEXT /* Preferred name of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the student was admitted to the university */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the major */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  "program_length" INTEGER /* Typical length of the program in years */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic adviser for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* IDs of prerequisite courses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of enrollment (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course, if applicable */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is auditing the course */,
  "grade_finalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the grade has been finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits completed by the student */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "semester_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current semester */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Honors or distinctions received by the student */,
  "academic_warning" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is on academic warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
